title: Phase 2C: Order state machine definition and tests
description: Define the order state machine with valid transitions, guard conditions, and side effects. Write comprehensive tests for all transitions.
steps: Create src/lib/state-machines/order.ts with state machine definition
Define all states: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, CONFIRMED, PICKING, PICKED, LOADING, LOADED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, PARTIAL_DELIVERY, REFUSED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, ON_HOLD
Define valid transitions with guard conditions (e.g., can't confirm without credit check, can't load without pick completion)
Define side effects per transition (audit events, notifications, exception triggers)
Test guard conditions block transitions when not met
Test side effects fire on successful transitions
